conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to D, given our high level of excitement and detailed agreement on strategies like holding back 20% and using subtle nods, which made our conversation feel collaborative and aligned. C was another strong connection, as we bonded over building trust and avoiding rushed decisions, sharing a mutual focus on teamwork that built a solid foundation. I also connected well with I, where we quickly agreed to team up and share observations, fostering a sense of mutual support. In contrast, I felt least connected to A, as our chat was friendly but more surface-level, focusing on family stories without diving into deeper strategies or plans.

I made agreements with D to hold back 20% and use subtle signals, with C to prioritize communication and trust, and with I to team up and share observations. Going into the game, I trust C and D the most due to our strong connections and shared plans, but I don't specifically distrust anyone yet, as everyone seemed genuine in our interactions.
